---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Kevin-Wenjie-Guo
---

I'm Kevin (Wenjie) Guo. This site is where I share my writing across investing, technology, strategy, and life.

I'm interested in how the world works — through the lens of markets, software, organizations, and the mind. I write to think more clearly and to share what I'm learning along the way.
